markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new strategy for refreshing BLC content.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**BLC Content Refresh:** The strategy shifts to refreshing high-performing BLC content from 2025. This involves analyzing its AI performance and testing new formats (e.g., structured tables) to improve AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** A two-step process is adopted: 1) initial research in a spreadsheet for efficient data culling, then 2) moving approved ideas to Airtable for prioritization and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**Centralized Data:** Key spreadsheets and reports will be consolidated in a central location (Notion or Airtable) to prevent critical work from getting lost in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Urgent Action:** Carrie will deliver a list of recommended BLC terms by EOD Tuesday for internal stakeholder review.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Disorganized Content Strategy

  - [**BLC Data Gap:** No central record of past BLC content plans from Vivek's time exists, necessitating a full data refresh to inform the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Dispersed Resources:** Critical spreadsheets and reports are scattered across Slack, making them hard to find and risking loss of valuable work.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Solution: New BLC Content Workflow

  - [**Strategy:** Refresh high-performing BLC content from 2025 to capitalize on proven success.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [**AI Performance:** Analyze successful content for its AI prompt performance.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Format Testing:** Test new formats (e.g., structured tables) to improve AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**Term Segmentation:**](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
      - [**Blog Content:** Focus on informational terms (e.g., "anonymous reporting hotlines").](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [**Commercial Pages:** Target solution-oriented terms (e.g., product comparisons).](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
    1.  [**Research:** Carrie delivers initial data in a spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
    2.  [**Cull:** KFarnham reviews and selects ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
    3.  [**Prioritize:** Approved ideas move to Airtable for prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**Data Consolidation:** A central Notion page or Airtable table will link to all key documents.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Mid-Month Performance Check-in

  - [Carrie provided a mid-month progress report, segmented by Business Unit (BU).](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [**Finding:** Performance is stable, with strong AI prompt coverage and solid keyword rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Deliver recommended BLC terms by EOD Tuesday for internal review.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Consolidate key documents into a central Notion page or Airtable table.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**KFarnham:**](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [Refresh BLC data and send to Carrie.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [Find the IT owner for the outstanding task.](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
      - [Coordinate next week's meeting via Slack (Carrie is OOO Mon & Fri).](https://fathom.video/share/3_5eGF_uA3MwbWANwz8eJfzs8TQJQzWv?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
